prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on benzene was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The HOMO energy is approximately -7.04683 eV, and the LUMO energy is approximately -0.41575 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is about 6.6311 eV. The calculation was performed using the PySCF engine.
